texto: If there was a God he reasoned it would have the same relation to us as we have to blades of grass. Do we make them grow? Yes in the sense that we water the lawn. Do we care for them and worry over them? Again as a lawn but not as individual blades. We don't give them names. We just want them to look nice and green. A God who created the earth would want it to look nice an blue from space. He would sit back after a long day of creating things and think to himself now that's what a planet should look like.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tom Lichtenberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “If there was a God he reasoned it would have the same relation to us as we have to blades of gras…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, creation, deism pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de deism e god.

Do we care for them and worry over them? Again as a lawn but not as individual blades. We don't give them names. We just want them to look nice and green. A God who created the earth would want it to look nice an blue from space. He would sit back after a long day of creating things and think to himself now that's what a planet should look like.

texto: There are no lessons to be learned from the past. This is the first thing I learned from it. There is nothing back then that there isn't here now. There is nothing here now - nothing that matters - that wasn't back then. What matters. Are you a good person? Do you have any love in your heart? What would you do in a given circumstance? It all comes down to something like that.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tom Lichtenberg: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “There are no lessons to be learned from the past. This is the first thing I learned from it. Ther…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, history, learning-from-history pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de learning-from-history e past.

There is nothing here now - nothing that matters - that wasn't back then. What matters. Are you a good person? Do you have any love in your heart? What would you do in a given circumstance? It all comes down to something like that.
